name: Kimika
message: "Everyone's looking at us..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha, they are..."
The atmosphere in the classroom was as uncomfortable as ever.
But the hate from before had disappeared. It had been replaced with confusion and ostracization.
Of course, the confusion stemmed from the incident last night.
It was huge... We could only thank our lucky stars that we were alive today and that the police hadn't gotten involved.

name: Kimika
message: "It's different from before, but the atmosphere here still doesn't feel very good."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha... You might be right."
It didn't feel like we were being bullied anymore, but... it was like we had become objects of fear, like Akasaka-san and Kitami-san had been before.
After the two of us checked that our seats were safe to sit in, Kimika whispered in my ear.

name: Kimika
message: "Satoko and Megu aren't here today, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You're right... Maybe they're just not here yet?"

name: Kimika
message: "Not yet, huh... Do you really think they'll come to school after that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "They weren't injured or anything..."

name: Kimika
message: "They weren't injured, but their pride definitely took a hit. They brought together all those people and they still couldn't beat one guy."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "Mamiya Takuji really was strong. I'd heard rumors, but..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, but I heard rumors he used to get bullied too..."

name: Kimika
message: "I wonder which one it is... Though, there's no way he just took up martial arts recently. He must have been practicing since he was a child to do that."

name: Zakuro
message: "I guess so..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah... It was almost like Aikido, but Aikido isn't useful in an actual fight unless you do it for fifty years."

name: Zakuro
message: "Fifty years?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, no matter how talented you are, you can't use Aikido in a real fight without tons of training."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then what about Mamiya-kun?"

name: Kimika
message: "He must have been doing it since he was really young... and he's obviously been in a lot of fights too."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't think it's possible he was ever bullied... I bet he spread that rumor himself so people wouldn't know he was such a thug."

name: Zakuro
message: "He spread it himself?"
I wonder... He definitely was strong last night, but the Mamiya-kun I've always known wasn't like that.
I don't know how to describe it...

name: Kimika
message: "Haa... You've been thinking about him all day, haven't you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "No surprise, I guess... He was the one who actually saved you, after all. Of course you'd be thinking about him..."
Her face looked really sad for some reason.
She must really hate Mamiya-kun...

name: Zakuro
message: "But he's a good person. He even gave you back your knife."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, I guess so."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't think he was a bad person like you said."

name: Kimika
message: "I know, I know... I know that much. Sorry, I guess I said something weird."
She still didn't have a good impression of Mamiya-kun, even after he saved us... It was like she hated him even more for doing it.

name: Zakuro
message: "Do you still hate him?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hate him, huh...
I still don't like him. I know that sounds strange, since he just saved us... and besides that..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Besides that?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm just frustrated by my own impotence."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, it's nothing... That's not important...
More importantly, he called you his toy. He's the worst."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh... That was probably just a figure of speech."

name: Kimika
message: "I still can't forgive him... All men are total pigs, not just Mamiya. After last night, I know that better than ever."
Why does she dislike him so much? It always looked like they were getting along when they talked, too...
Actually... is Mamiya-kun at school today?
He wasn't injured after the incident last night, so there's no reason for him to skip school.
Though he did say something strange.

name: Mamiya
message: "Hurry up... I only have today left. Starting tomorrow, it looks like someone a bit more peaceful is gonna take the role of Mamiya Takuji."

name: Mamiya
message: "Come on, if you want to get revenge on me for all the pain I've inflicted on you, now's your last chance."
What did he mean by that?
Those words seemed out of place.
Why would he say it's their last chance?

name: Kimika
message: "If you're that worried, why don't you go look for him?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "He's probably on the roof, right?"

name: Kimika
message: "You have a lot you want to ask him... A lot you want to talk to him about, right?"
Kimika smiled gently.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... Thank you."
But I wonder why her expression looks sadder every time I look at her.

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "You probably want to know what he meant when he said 'last chance,' right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... I can't stop thinking about it."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha... You're so honest, Zakuro."

name: Kimika
message: "Shouldn't you go ask him right now, then? You have to do it before it's too late. There are too many things in this world that can slip through your fingers if you don't grab them when the opportunity presents itself."

name: Kimika
message: "I think... there's something you need to say to him before it's too late."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha, don't look at me like that. I'm just talking in generalities. I'm not telling you to do anything. I just thought there might be something like that you wanted to say."

name: Kimika
message: "Anyway, you should go see him... Go talk to him."

name: Kimika
message: "He's the one who can really protect you... There's no guarantee Akasaka and Kitami won't try to get revenge again."

name: Zakuro
message: "But then what about you? Shouldn't you go too?"

name: Kimika
message: "I don't want him to save me again! I'll manage on my own!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, sorry...
Why did I just shout like that? Maybe I'm still on edge because of what happened yesterday..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika..."

name: Kimika
message: "Anyway, just go... It's gonna be lunchtime soon. Heck, if you two want to go the infirmary for fifth period, I'll cover for you."
After she said that... she looked down, avoiding eye contact with me.
Why?
We're finally free from the bullying... What's she so upset about?
I was a bit confused...
Akasaka-san and Kitami-san didn't come to school that morning... All of the students who got beaten up by Mamiya-kun were absent.
I heard rumors that some of them were hospitalized.
At noon, Kimika went to buy some bread. She didn't say a word to me.
I decided to take her suggestion and head to the rooftop.
He was reading, like always.

name: Zakuro
message: "Hello..."
I was always frightened when I talked to him before, but this time I managed to say hello in a calm voice.

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... You again?"
He looked at me like I was a pest... He seemed like the Mamiya-kun from last night.

name: Zakuro
message: "Is today's Mamiya the version that's not acting?"

name: Mamiya
message: "...What do you want?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't want anything... I just wanted to say thank you."

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't need your thanks. That was just a game to me. You could say that's one of my hobbies..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's one of your... hobbies?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah... My hobby is hurting people."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But you didn't hurt me. You actually protected me..."

name: Mamiya
message: "It's no fun hurting someone like you. You're already powerless... It's more fun to beat up the strongest people I can find. That's all."
I looked at the book he was reading...
As always, it looked like a really hard book to read.

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you reading today?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What's it matter... It has nothing to do with you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... It's says, 'On Learned Ignorance'..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... Yeah, that's right. It's by Nicolaus Cusanus."

name: Zakuro
message: "What's it about?"

name: Mamiya
message: "It's a theology book..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Theology? Like Christianity and stuff like that?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah... Something like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, are you a Christian, Mamiya-kun?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Why would you think that? I hate religion..."
He spoke without a hint of emotion in his voice until he got to the word 'religion,' which he spoke with disgust.
Does he really hate religion?

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You hate it? Ahaha, I'm sorry... I just thought that might be why you're reading that..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Is there any reason someone who hates religion shouldn't read theology?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, no, I don't think that at all... S-So, is it fun reading stuff you hate?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Not at all."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's not?"

name: Mamiya
message: "It's too complicated. I don't know what any of it means..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Too complicated? But you're still reading it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah."

name: Zakuro
message: "What kind of book is it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Just what it says on the cover..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then it's about learned ignorance?"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right."

name: Zakuro
message: "Is that so..."
This hardly even qualifies as a conversation...
He keeps analyzing everything I say... He's totally different from the Mamiya-kun I met here before.
How can I make this conversation work? We have to have a real conversation if I want to talk to him about anything.
...Maybe if I ask him some questions?

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, what parts don't you understand?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Pretty much all of it..."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh... B-But, specifically..."
Mamiya-kun glared at me.
Sh-Shoot... I guess I was too persistent.

name: Mamiya
message: "For example, let's say there's a circle on a plane."

name: Zakuro
message: "Okay..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Take any point on the perimeter of the circle and expand the circle from there... What would happen?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It would be bigger than the first."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yes... The edge of the new circle would look like a curved line, right? But what would happen if the circle was infinitely large?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? An infinitely large circle? Um, the curvature would gradually decrease..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, that's right. As the circle grows larger, it comes closer to being a straight line."

name: Mamiya
message: "But what would happen if it was infinitely large?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What would happen?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Cusanus said it would become a perfectly straight line."

name: Zakuro
message: "Would it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, mathematically it has to be a straight line. If you take any two points AB on the perimeter of a circle and call the midpoint C and the point within a tighter circle D... Well, I guess it would be easiest to think of it as the curvature becoming infinitely small."

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You probably learned it in class, when we learned about repeating decimals."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... did we?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, there are a lot of students who can't understand that 0.999 is equal to one. The teachers hate teaching it because so many students refuse to accept it."

name: Zakuro
message: "0.999... is a number with an infinite number of nines, right? Is it really equal to 1?"

name: Mamiya
message: "The theory behind it is kind of complicated, but it's not hard to understand intuitively with fractions... For instance, 1/3 = 0.333..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then 2/3 is of course equal to 0.666..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then if we multiply 1/3 by 3, 3/3 = 0.999... That should make sense."

name: Zakuro
message: "H-Huh? I guess so, but that's really strange... 3/3 is supposed to be 1."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then what part was wrong?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What part was wrong... Uh..."

name: Mamiya
message: "You won't be able to come up with anything. There's no mistake."

name: Mamiya
message:
"If you accept that 1/3 = 0.333..., then you have to accept that 
3/3 = 0.999..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then the only way to solve the contradiction of 3/3 being equal to both 1 and 0.999... is to accept one simple thing: that 0.999 is equal to 1."

name: Mamiya
message: "In other words, the repeating decimal 0.999 is in fact not slightly smaller than 1, but actually identical to it. That's what infinity means."

name: Mamiya
message: "Cusanus' example of a circle follows the exact same pattern if you think of it as the distance between C and D..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I see..."
I don't get it at all... I heard his grades weren't good, but I guess he really is smart.
And besides...

name: Zakuro
message: "When I asked you, you said you didn't understand that book at all... You wouldn't be able to give that kind of explanation if you didn't understand it."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, you're right."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What don't you understand about it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, I just find that stuff really interesting... He was a Cardinal, a mathematician, and a philosopher, and he had a great influence on the philosophers that came after him."

name: Mamiya
message: "According to him, his idea that the curvature of an infinitely large circle forms a straight line is perfectly consistent with the logic of our finite world."

name: Mamiya
message: "Infinity can solve any contradiction within our world."

name: Zakuro
message: "Within infinity, all contradictions cease to be contradictions..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So then, this is the problem... Why was he so fascinated with infinity? What was the infinity that he spoke of?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, he was a theologist. Does that mean he was talking about God?"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right. This book basically says there's only one God. A single infinite being... In other words, it's a book that tried to prove that God is infinite."

name: Mamiya
message: "Just like 0.999 is equal to one, God is one and everything..."
O-Oh... I don't get it.

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, that's kind of hard for me to understand, but... it seems like you understand it just fine, doesn't it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I don't understand it at all..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "For instance, Cusanus says there's one single infinity... But that's a lie."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's a lie?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, there are different kinds of infinities... Georg Cantor discovered that 400 years after Cusanus' death."

name: Mamiya
message: "Infinities have density... It can be proven with the diagonal argument."

name: Mamiya
message: "Cusanus said that there is one infinite God... but in reality there are different kinds of infinity."

name: Mamiya
message: "And more importantly, his book doesn't even prove the existence of God."

name: Mamiya
message: "His claim that all contradictions cease to become contradictions within infinity doesn't prove his claim that God exists."

name: Mamiya
message: "And he used a triangle to prove the justice of the Trinity..."
Um... Um... I can't follow his explanation.
He was a theologist and a mathematician, and he tried to use math to prove the existence of God... Is that right?
Then what's a Cantor?
Calm down... Calm down and think...
First of all...

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, what's a Cantor? Is it some kind of software? Did you install it?"
Oh, no... He doesn't look happy...

name: Mamiya
message: "What do you want? I've been trying to drive you away by going on and on about stuff you wouldn't understand..."

name: Mamiya
message: "And yet you still keep trying to continue the conversation?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, do you mind if I sit next to you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yes, I do."
Oh, he rejected me just like that... But I won't give up.

name: Zakuro
message: "Then what about across from you..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't sit across from me either."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then how about... behind you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Are you gonna stare at my back? That would be creepy."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? You don't mind?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course I mind... That's even worse than the others."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, do you really want nothing to do with me?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... You really are a stubborn woman."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry... I just wanted to know more about you..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Why do you need to know more about me?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't need a reason just to learn about you, do I?"

name: Zakuro
message: "And besides, why are you reading a book you don't like?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't read books I don't like..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's a lie! Earlier, when I asked if you were having fun reading that book, you said, 'Not at all'!"
When I used a much stronger tone than before, Mamiya-kun looked surprised for a moment, and then he laughed.

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehe... You're a strange woman. Why are you taking me so seriously?"
Mamiya-kun looked up at the sky.

name: Mamiya
message: "All right. It might be nice to talk to someone at the end."

name: Zakuro
message: "A-At the end? Are you going to transfer to a different school?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I'm not transferring."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-Then..."
He shouldn't say 'the end' like that... It sounds like he's sick, or he's going to commit suicide. He shouldn't say that.

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't worry. Mamiya Takuji won't die. You'll probably be able to meet him any time you want... and he'll probably be much kinder than I am now..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So nothing bad is going to happen..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I don't understand what you mean. Or rather..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't understand anything about you!"

name: Mamiya
message: "You don't, huh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, you leave me with a different impression every time we meet..."

name: Mamiya
message: "A different impression, huh... I guess so."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, your personality, your hobbies, your actions... everything about you changes too much from time to time."

name: Mamiya
message: "...I guess so."

name: Zakuro
message: "Now that I think of it... the Christian that Roxanne knew looked like one person, but in reality had the body of Christian and the mind of Cyrano..."

name: Zakuro
message: "He wasn't one person... He was acted out by two different people."

name: Zakuro
message: "Neither the handsome Christian nor the intelligent Cyrano could attract the attention of Roxanne, who was both beautiful and smart."

name: Mamiya
message: "Cyrano de Bergerac, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh! We have our pockets full. Our lady-loves,―phantasms of our brains,―Dream-fancies blown into soap-bubbles!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Come! Take it, and change"

name: Zakuro
message: "feigned love-words into true."

name: Zakuro
message: "I breathed my sighs and moans haphazard-wise; Call all these wandering love-birds home to nest."

name: Zakuro
message: "Come! Take it. You'll see that I was in these lettered lines,"

name: Zakuro
message: "―Eloquent all the more, the less sincere!"

name: Mamiya
message: "So you read it enough times to recite it from memory..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, I read it over and over."

name: Mamiya
message: "Why would you read the same book so many times?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You read it over and over too, didn't you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "So I wanted to find out what you were really thinking when you said you liked this book."

name: Mamiya
message: "I see. So you want to know what he thought when he read Cyrano de Bergerac... So I've read it over and over, huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "And? When you read Cyrano... what did you think?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I thought a lot of things, but there were a ton of things that applied to you... or rather, places where you overlapped with the text."

name: Mamiya
message: "Overlapped, huh... Okay, for instance, what?"

name: Zakuro
message: "There were two men who changed feigned love words into true... It was the one imaginary man who Roxanne loved."

name: Mamiya
message: "And how does that overlap with Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, do you have a twin, Mamiya-kun?"

name: Mamiya
message: "A twin?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That happens sometimes in manga, right? It seems like there's someone who looks exactly like someone else... and it turns out it's that person's twin, for instance..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehehehe... I see, a twin, huh? So your theory is that Mamiya Takuji has a twin..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, but..."
The Mamiya-kun I met underground was completely different too, so that would make three of them...

name: Zakuro
message: "Excuse me, I want to revise my theory."

name: Mamiya
message: "How so?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you triplets? Or maybe there's one real Mamiya-kun and two lookalikes?"

name: Mamiya
message: "All right... Triplets, or two lookalikes. That would be pretty convenient, wouldn't it? It would make it really easy to skip school."

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you saying... I'm completely wrong?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Who knows? Maybe you're on the right track..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Okay, then... In order to get closer to the beautiful woman, Roxanne, they needed two personalities, one who was handsome and one who was intelligent."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm, I think you've convinced me... I think now I can understand why she loved reading Cyrano so much."

name: Zakuro
message: "She?"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right... Me, and her, and finally, Mamiya Takuji... Maybe it was necessary for us to accomplish something."

name: Zakuro
message: "To accomplish something?"
Accomplish something... So Mamiya-kun needed a body double to accomplish something?
In other words, there's more than one Mamiya-kun.
That must be it.

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, Mamiya-kun, do you all have different names?"
He didn't answer. He just looked at my face...

name: Zakuro
message: "Would you tell me the name of today's Mamiya-kun?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I can't do that..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Why? I want to know your real name."

name: Mamiya
message: "My real name, huh..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Let me ask you this, since you read Cyrano so many times you can recite it from memory. Did Cyrano, who acted as Christian's mind, wish for Roxanne to know who he was?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "When Cyrano died, Roxanne found out that he had been the source of Christian's wit, but it was completely unexpected. It was like an accident..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Cyrano hid it until the moment of his death. Did he wish for Roxanne to find out who he really was?"
Did Cyrano wish for it?
I slowly recalled Cyrano de Bergerac's plot.
Christian and Cyrano both loved Roxanne. They worked together to act out a single person and attract the attention of Roxanne.
But since Christian acted as the pair's outward appearance, he was the one who Roxanne fell in love with.
It's only natural... Intelligence has no physical form, whereas a handsome face does.
People don't fall in love with shapeless ideas but rather physical people.
Roxanne couldn't love Cyrano's immaterial intelligence. She could only love Cyrano's intelligence when it was given the form of Christian's outward appearance...
Cyrano himself is immaterial... That's why Roxanne fell in love with Christian, not Cyrano.
So Cyrano had to play the fool in front of Roxanne...
Cyrano could never be anything to Roxanne.
Even after Christian had died...
He had to keep playing the fool in front of Roxanne.
"I breathed my sighs and moans haphazard-wise; Call all these wandering love-birds home to nest."
There's a deep significance to those words.
The person who dreams and the person who acts.
The fantasy is ended by action.
A fantasy can exist only in its unfulfillment.
Our lady loves, the phantasms of our brains, dream fancies blown into soap bubbles... It is the lover of our fantasy that we fall in love with...
Cyrano's love was fantasy only because it was unfulfilled...
Christian's death is irrelevant.

name: Mamiya
message: "Even after Christian died, Cyrano never told Roxanne that he had acted as Christian's wit..."

name: Mamiya
message: "But the truth was revealed when Cyrano read Christian's farewell letter in front of her; though in truth, it was Cyrano's farewell letter."

name: Mamiya
message: "Roxanne remembered his voice reading the letters..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But Cyrano denied his own existence... He denied that he had been Christian's intelligence."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right... What do you think of that, Takashima?"
Cyrano's feelings... Maybe he really didn't want Roxanne to find out his true identity...
He definitely acted to keep it secret from her...
He always, always kept it hidden from her...
Mamiya-kun compared Cyrano to himself... There's only one thing he could possibly mean by that.

name: Zakuro
message: "...All right. I won't ask anymore."

name: Zakuro
message: "For now, at least."

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... For now, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, just for now."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehe..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What's funny?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No, it really is funny... The Takashima I knew wasn't like that. You've changed."

name: Zakuro
message: "H-Have I changed that much?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, you're completely different from before... I never would've imagined you acting like this after seeing the way you were always so scared before."

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe so, but... it's not like I was scared when I was talking to you."

name: Mamiya
message: "You weren't?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... I was nervous."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehe... Really?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, I always looked forward to coming here and talking to you."

name: Mamiya
message: "I see... Glad to hear it."

name: Zakuro
message: "What's with your reaction? I'm saying it to you!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, really... I guess you are."

name: Zakuro
message: "So, for now, I won't ask anymore, but... please tell me someday."

name: Mamiya
message: "Someday, huh... I see."

name: Zakuro
message: "What do you mean, you see? Please, just tell me your name."
Mamiya-kun was silent.

name: Zakuro
message: "Now that I think of it... you said there was something you had to accomplish, didn't you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I did..."

name: Zakuro
message: "What did you mean by that?"

name: Mamiya
message: "It's something that can't be done alone... so we took on multiple forms. That's all."

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you talking about Cyrano?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Nah... I'm talking about God."

name: Zakuro
message: "God?"

name: Mamiya
message: "God takes the form of the Trinity... Cusanus said that was because the triangle was the smallest polygon."

name: Zakuro
message: "Cusanus? That's the book you were reading, right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right... He said the triangle was the smallest constituent element of all other polygons... In other words, it is one."

name: Mamiya
message: "God is the Trinity because the triangle is the smallest. According to his theory, the smallest is equal to infinity."

name: Mamiya
message: "Even God needed three forms to accomplish something... so naturally, so do humans."

name: Mamiya
message: "Creation... Harmony... Rebirth... Humans also need each form."

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you talking about the Christian God?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No... That's a personal matter. The Christian God doesn't have a privileged position."

name: Zakuro
message: "A privileged position?"

name: Mamiya
message: "He's not privileged over others. Well, that's not important..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Look, lunchtime is over."

name: Zakuro
message: "You're right."

name: Mamiya
message: "We didn't even get a chance to eat."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... We were talking the whole time."

name: Mamiya
message: "Here."
He threw some bread at me.

name: Mamiya
message: "You can have that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, but..."

name: Mamiya
message: "It'll be fine. Just take it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Okay..."

name: Mamiya
message: "What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, what did you mean by 'the end'?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I didn't mean anything. Forget about it..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Tomorrow will be the same... A normal, peaceful day. See ya, Takashima Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh... sure."
A peaceful day... A normal day... It seems like I haven't had one of those in a long time.
Lately I haven't been able to take anything for granted. That's just how we've been living recently...

name: Zakuro
message: "Hey, Mamiya-kun!"

name: Mamiya
message: "What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Will you still be friends with me, even if our days are peaceful?"
He looked troubled for a moment, and then he said...

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course... Come here anytime you want ――――――..."
I couldn't hear the last words he said...
But I think he said he would be happy to talk to me anytime.
